description_long: This is a wooden park bench with a simple, robust design, featuring three horizontal slats forming the backrest and two wide planks making up the seat. The bench is supported by two sturdy, X-shaped wooden legs on each side, which are anchored to broad rectangular wooden feet for stability. The wood has a medium brown finish with visible grain patterns, giving it a natural and rustic appearance suitable for outdoor environments. The bench lacks armrests, providing an open seating area that can accommodate multiple people. The construction appears solid, with metal fasteners at the corners for reinforcement. Its overall design is practical and functional, ideal for parks, sidewalks, or other public spaces.
description: A sturdy wooden bench with a slatted backrest and seat, supported by X-shaped legs and broad feet, finished in a natural brown tone.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three-slat backrest, wide seat planks, and both X-shaped legs with rectangular feet.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the seat and backrest planks, as well as the X-shaped leg structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the slatted backrest and the supporting structure of the legs and feet.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the depth of the seat and the cross-braced leg design.
attribute_leg_design: X-shaped wooden supports with rectangular feet
